target_audience: online coaches who want to scale past $10k/month
specific_problem: not having a consistent, predictable way to get clients
specific_outcome: a client acquisition system that generates $10k+ months consistently
owner_backstory: Started as a broke coach making $2k a month. Spent two years figuring out what actually works for getting clients without paid ads. Now runs a multiple six-figure coaching business and teaches other coaches to do the same. Has helped over 80 coaches hit their first $10k month.
qualification_criteria: They have a real, specific problem with getting clients or scaling revenue
They have real intent to fix it now — not someday, not next quarter
They have some existing revenue or the means to invest in a solution
They are the decision maker or can get to one fast
